qwen.durationCaveat: Promptfoo reported cached eval tokens, so 6.8-7.0s durations are not fresh uncached qwen throughput evidence.

stream17ProfileSensitivity.defaultSurfaceCaveat: results/matrix-summary.json and results/promptfoo-latest.json point only to the final qwen gpu_full cell; use this stream17 artifact and raw JSONLs for the full profile-sensitivity slice.
stream17ProfileSensitivity.placementImplications: Quality was invariant across the tested qwen/liquid profiles in this cached current-suite slice. Keep liquid@gpu_full for speed/fit; keep qwen@gpu_offload as specialist recommendation because W7/tracker evidence and prior uncached offload history still matter, not because Stream 17 pass rate differentiated profiles.
stream17ProfileSensitivity.remainingGaps: User review, broad/full matrix, large practical proof, uncached qwen/liquid throughput, broad partial-profile measurement across other models, and final 3-solid selection remain incomplete.

stream18MidSizeTaskSlice.scope: Mid-size local fallback task coverage beyond build-synthetic-smoke; three models, three lane-representative task ids, gpu_offload only, LM Studio local only.

taskSelection.note: plan-build-ordering and tool-search-docs were not manifest task ids; plan-synthetic-smoke and tool-call-search-docs are valid lane-equivalent ids in baselines/manifest.json and suites/promptfoo/tests.

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: 2026/06/07 07:17:40.890, RTX 2080 Super Max-Q, 8192 MiB total, 435 MiB used, 7553 MiB free, 5% utilization

runtimeAfter.lmsPs: No models are currently loaded after explicit lms unload --all.

stream18MidSizeTaskSlice.defaultSurfaceCaveat: results/matrix-summary.json points only to the final tool-call-search-docs JSONL; results/promptfoo-latest.json, baseline-comparison.jsonl, and user-judge-queue.jsonl point only to the final google/gemma-4-12b-qat tool-call-search-docs cell. Use this artifact and the raw JSONLs for the full Stream 18 slice.
stream18MidSizeTaskSlice.assessment: No mid-size cell timed out. The wider local fallback slice adds three non-build tasks over three mid-size models at gpu_offload. Plan lane passed for all three models; research-harness-tools passed for 12B and 12B-QAT but failed for GLM; tool-call-search-docs passed only for GLM while both Gemma 12B variants emitted tool-call-shaped text that failed the direct output assertion.
stream18MidSizeTaskSlice.remainingGaps: This is still a small local fallback slice, not broad/full Promptfoo coverage, partial-profile coverage, subjective user review, large practical proof, final 3-solid selection, or completion verification.

stream19UserReviewPacket.scope: User-review packet and final-gap audit prep only; no LM Studio model loads, matrix cells, baseline collection, cloud/API calls, or subjective scoring.
stream19UserReviewPacket.assessment: Stream 19 prepares a traceable human-review packet and machine-readable artifact/count summary only. It does not complete subjective review, promote final placement, or choose final 3 solid models.
remainingGaps: Broad/full local matrix coverage remains incomplete.
Broad partial-profile measurements outside contained slices remain incomplete.
Final campaign completion verification remains incomplete.

stream20MidSizePartialProfile.purpose: Mid-size partial-profile comparison on the best-behaved Stream 18 task, plan-synthetic-smoke.
stream20MidSizePartialProfile.scope: LM Studio local fallback only; one bounded cell per mid-size model using the recommended partial profile.

stream20MidSizePartialProfile.commandShape: EVAL_USE_PROMPTFOO=false; EVAL_TASK_FILTER=plan-synthetic-smoke; EVAL_CELL_TIMEOUT_MS=300000; EVAL_SMOKE_MODELS=<one model>; EVAL_SMOKE_PROFILES=<recommended partial>; node scripts/run-matrix.mjs --smoke
stream20MidSizePartialProfile.defaultSurfaceCaveat: results/matrix-summary.json, results/promptfoo-latest.json, baseline-comparison.jsonl, and user-judge-queue.jsonl point only to the final google/gemma-4-12b-qat@gpu_partial_0.95 plan-synthetic-smoke cell. Use this artifact and raw JSONLs for the full Stream 20 three-cell slice.
stream20MidSizePartialProfile.assessment: All three recommended partial-profile cells completed 1/1 with no timeout and preserved the Stream 18 gpu_offload pass result on plan-synthetic-smoke. Duration deltas are small-to-moderate on a single local-fallback task: 12B partial was 446 ms faster, GLM partial was 6438 ms slower, and 12B-QAT partial was 4623 ms faster. Treat duration comparison as weak single-task evidence, not a broad throughput ranking.
stream20MidSizePartialProfile.remainingGaps: This narrows mid-size partial-profile coverage only for one task and one recommended partial per model. Broad/full matrix coverage, mid-size partials on other tasks, large practical proof, subjective user review, final 3-solid selection, and completion verification remain open.
